svg.text: How the Threat Hunting Platform Works
Follow the numbered arrows to see how an attack is detected, from attacker action to analyst response
secretly sends data out via DNS
stop here — they miss clever attacks
Our platform pulls events from Wazuh and
These attacks look normal — only AI can spot them
Maps attack to known techniques (MITRE ATT&CK),
shows which features triggered the alert (SHAP),
and recommends what the analyst should do
✓ AI that spots attacks hiding in normal-looking activity
✓ Gets smarter over time through collaboration (federated learning)
